meaning: adj.[医]骨髓及外骨髓增殖的
examples: Objective to discuss the diagnosis and treatment of portal hypertension secondary to myeloproliferative diseases.
Chronic myelocytic leukemia is a clonal proliferation of hematopoietic stem cells caused by myeloproliferative disorders.
Conditions included myelodysplastic syndrome, myeloproliferative disorders, acute myeloid leukemia, and bronchial carcinoma.
Why had all the smartest minds in myeloproliferative research been doing the same thing, without working together?
In 1997 Chicago real estate investor Robert Rosen was diagnosed with something he'd never heard of: a myeloproliferative disorder.
